name: Franklin Crypto Trust
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF THE TRUST The Franklin Crypto Trust (the Trust) was formed as a Delaware statutory trust on August 13, 2024, and is governed by the provisions of the Second Amended and Restated Agreement and Declaration of Trust dated as of February 4, 2025 (the Declaration of Trust). The Trust is not registered as an investment company under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended (the Investment Company Act) and is not a commodity pool for purposes of the Commodity Exchange Act (C...
